brain_consensus.narrative: Bitcoin hovers in a twilight zone at $65,883, where a Fear & Greed reading of 25 mirrors the exact despair seen during the August 2024 bottom. Yet beneath the surface, stablecoin reserves are quietly ballooning, signaling that smart money is loading up for the next leg while retail panics. This is the classic denial phase—where the crowd sees risk, but the liquidity foundations are being laid for a violent revaluation higher.
brain_consensus.headline: Dry Powder Builds as Fear Grips the Herd

next_move.reasoning: Bottom analog with matching fear/stables/MVRV but ETF flows and BTC dominance fade are already elevated vs August 2024, suggesting we're further along recovery than the 79% similarity implies; however my 0% track record on direction calls demands humility—I've repeatedly forced UP/DOWN and got HOLD, so the structural setup says UP but my own history says the market may chop instead.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed rises above 30 with BTC momentum sustaining above 55 and funding cooling below 45
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed drops below 20, VIX spikes above 75, or BTC momentum falls below 40 with funding rising above 60
